plan_metrics.plan_content:
Here is the complete implementation plan.

---

## Summary

**8 files total** — 4 new, 4 modified. No new dependencies, no build config changes.

### New files

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `packages/contracts/src/theme.ts` | `ThemeId` schema (`"t3-dark"\|"t3-light"\|"t3-midnight"`), `ThemeColorTokens` + `ThemeDefinition` interfaces |
| `apps/web/src/themes.ts` | Three `ThemeDefinition` objects with actual color values, `BUILT_IN_THEMES`, `getThemeById()` |
| `apps/web/src/hooks/useTheme.tsx` | Complete replacement of `useTheme.ts` (renamed to `.tsx`); keeps `useSyncExternalStore` pattern; exports `useTheme()` + thin `ThemeProvider` |
| `apps/web/src/components/ThemeSelector.tsx` | 3-card grid with `ThemeSwatch` previews (sidebar/editor/statusBar/primary strip) |

### Modified files

| File | Change |
|---|---|
| `packages/contracts/src/index.ts` | One line: `export * from "./theme"` |
| `apps/web/src/index.css` | Add `[data-theme="t3-dark"]`, `[data-theme="t3-light"]`, `[data-theme="t3-midnight"]` CSS blocks with all tokens + 9 new surface vars; existing `:root` block untouched |
| `apps/web/src/routes/__root.tsx` | Wrap `RootRouteView` body in `<ThemeProvider>` |
| `apps/web/src/routes/_chat.settings.tsx` | Replace Appearance section with `<ThemeSelector />`; remove old `THEME_OPTIONS` constant |

### Key design decisions
- **`useSyncExternalStore`** (not React Context) — consistent with `appSettings.ts` and the existing hook pattern
- **Storage key `"t3code:theme"` reused** — validates against `ThemeId`, falls back to `"t3-dark"`; no data loss for existing users
- **Module-load `applyTheme()` preserved** — prevents flash before React hydrates
- **`packages/shared/package.json` untouched** — theme runtime data lives in `apps/web/src/themes.ts`, not in the shared package
